title: lannea barteri
intro: Lannea barteri, also known as the African cherry or wild plum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Anacardiaceae. This plant is rich in medicinal properties and is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Lannea barteri include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or tincture for medicinal use, although specific herbal preparations may vary depending on the region and cultural practices.
